executive_summary_zh: 今天最强信号集中在 GitHub Copilot 的企业治理与代理运行控制：managed-settings.json 正式可用、企业可默认启用自动选模，以及 CLI/SDK 新增会话级 AI credit 限额。
这些更新说明 AI coding 正在从“个人助手”走向“可治理、可预算、可标准化的企业代理平台”，对平台团队和工程效率负责人尤其重要。
次强信号包括 Copilot CLI 的插件化仓库理解能力增强（C++ language server setup skill）以及多模态输入正式普及，表明代码代理正在补齐真实工程上下文接入能力。
executive_summary_en: The highest-signal updates today are around GitHub Copilot enterprise governance and agent runtime control: managed-settings.json is GA, enterprises can default to auto model selection, and Copilot CLI/SDK now support session-level AI credit limits.

Together, these changes show AI coding shifting from a personal assistant into a governable, budgetable, standardized enterprise agent platform—highly relevant for platform teams and engineering productivity leaders.

Secondary but meaningful signals include stronger repo-understanding via a pluginized C++ language-server setup skill and broader multimodal input support, both of which improve real-world coding-agent context access.

items.title: Enterprise managed-settings.json is generally available
items.summary_zh: GitHub Enterprise Cloud 现已正式支持通过 .github-private 仓库中的 managed-settings.json 对 Copilot 客户端进行集中治理。该配置可覆盖用户本地文件级设置，当前适用于 VS Code 与 Copilot CLI，并会在用户认证时拉取、按小时刷新。
items.summary_en: GitHub Enterprise Cloud now generally supports centralized Copilot governance via managed-settings.json stored in a .github-private repository. The config overrides user file-based settings, currently applies to VS Code and Copilot CLI, and is fetched at auth time with hourly refresh.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这是 AI coding 在企业内走向“策略即配置”的关键一步。它把模型选择、插件市场白名单/黑名单、绕过权限等控制从文档规范变成可执行治理层，意味着平台团队终于可以像管理 CI、依赖源和开发者工作站一样管理 AI 助手与代理能力。
items.why_it_matters_en: This is a key step toward policy-as-config for enterprise AI coding. It turns model selection, plugin marketplace controls, and bypass permissions from informal guidance into enforceable governance, giving platform teams a way to manage AI assistants and agents like CI, package registries, or developer workstations.
key_takeaways_zh: 配置项包括 model、enabledPlugins、strictKnownMarketplaces、disableBypassPermissionsMode 等，覆盖治理与扩展入口。
managed-settings.json 优先级高于用户本地配置，且基于服务端分发，适合企业统一标准化。
key_takeaways_en: Supported keys include model, enabledPlugins, strictKnownMarketplaces, and disableBypassPermissionsMode, covering both governance and extensibility.
managed-settings.json takes precedence over local user config and is distributed server-side, making it suitable for enterprise standardization.

items.title: Set AI credit session limits in Copilot CLI and SDK
items.summary_zh: Copilot CLI 与 GitHub Copilot SDK 新增会话级 AI credit 限额，可通过 /limits 或 --max-ai-credits 控制单次交互或自动化任务的成本上限。达到限额后代理会收尾并停止，适用于无人值守的脚本、批处理与自动修复任务。
items.summary_en: Copilot CLI and the GitHub Copilot SDK now support session-level AI credit caps via /limits or --max-ai-credits, allowing teams to bound the cost of interactive sessions or unattended automation. When the cap is reached, the agent wraps up and stops.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这解决了代码代理进入生产自动化时最现实的问题之一：成本失控。对内部平台、批量迁移、自动修复、CI 代理任务来说，预算护栏是大规模采用前提；而且它把“token/cost budget”提升为运行时一等控制面。
items.why_it_matters_en: This addresses one of the most practical blockers to production agent use: runaway cost. For internal platforms, bulk migrations, autofix flows, and CI agent jobs, budget guardrails are prerequisite to scale, and this elevates token/cost budgets into a first-class runtime control.
key_takeaways_zh: 限额覆盖模型调用、子代理与后台 compaction，说明 GitHub 已把代理执行视作多步骤 runtime，而非单次 prompt。
这是软上限而非硬上限，团队在自动化场景中仍需结合全局预算、告警和作业级策略。
key_takeaways_en: The limit spans model calls, subagents, and background compaction, signaling that GitHub is treating agent execution as a multi-step runtime rather than a single prompt.
It is a soft cap rather than a strict one, so teams still need global budgets, alerting, and job-level policies for automation.

items.title: Enterprises can default to auto model selection
items.summary_zh: 企业管理员现在可以在 managed-settings.json 中将 Copilot 的默认模型设置为 auto，使新会话默认使用自动选模，但仍允许用户按会话切换模型。
items.summary_en: Enterprise admins can now set Copilot’s default model to auto in managed-settings.json, making automatic model selection the default for new conversations while still allowing per-conversation overrides.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这不是简单 UI 选项，而是企业在“模型策略运营化”上的重要动作。它把模型路由从用户个人偏好，转向由平台统一定义的默认策略，有利于在质量、成本、时延之间做全局优化，也为后续基于任务类型的动态路由打基础。
items.why_it_matters_en: This is more than a UI tweak; it operationalizes model strategy at the enterprise layer. It shifts routing from individual preference toward centrally defined defaults, enabling portfolio-level optimization across quality, cost, and latency, and setting the stage for task-aware dynamic routing.
key_takeaways_zh: 自动选模已可作为企业默认值下发，说明模型编排开始成为 Copilot 的核心控制面。
用户仍可按会话覆盖默认值，体现了治理与开发者自主性的折中。
key_takeaways_en: Auto model selection can now be pushed as an enterprise default, showing that model orchestration is becoming a core Copilot control plane.
Users can still override per conversation, balancing governance with developer autonomy.

items.title: New C++ language server config skill for Copilot CLI
items.summary_zh: Copilot CLI 现在可通过插件市场安装 Microsoft C++ Language Server，并附带生成/刷新 compile_commands.json 的内置 setup skill，支持 CMake、MSBuild 及自定义构建模式。
items.summary_en: Copilot CLI can now install the Microsoft C++ Language Server from the plugin marketplace and includes a built-in setup skill to generate or refresh compile_commands.json for CMake, MSBuild, and custom build setups.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这是“代理如何理解真实仓库”的高信号案例。对 C/C++ 这类高度依赖构建系统语义的语言，仅靠文本检索远远不够；通过 language server + setup skill，Copilot 开始把仓库语义接入、环境准备和工具调用流程产品化。
items.why_it_matters_en: This is a high-signal example of how agents gain real repo understanding. For languages like C/C++ that depend heavily on build-system semantics, text retrieval alone is insufficient; by combining a language server with a setup skill, Copilot is productizing semantic repo access, environment prep, and tool invocation.
key_takeaways_zh: 插件化安装替代 npm 方式，意味着 Copilot CLI 的扩展生态和分发路径正在标准化。
自动生成 compile_commands.json 解决了代理接入大型原生代码库时最常见的上下文缺失问题。
key_takeaways_en: Plugin-based installation replaces the previous npm path, indicating a more standardized extension ecosystem and distribution model for Copilot CLI.
Automatic compile_commands.json generation tackles one of the biggest context gaps when agents operate on large native codebases.

items.title: Copilot vision is generally available
items.summary_zh: Copilot vision 正式可用，用户可在 VS Code、github.com 与 Copilot CLI 中向聊天附加图片和 PDF，让 Copilot 联合视觉材料与代码进行推理。
items.summary_en: Copilot vision is now generally available, allowing users across VS Code, github.com, and Copilot CLI to attach images and PDFs so Copilot can reason over visual materials alongside code.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 虽然不像治理能力那样关键，但它拓宽了代码代理的上下文边界：架构图、报错截图、设计文档、PDF 规范都可直接进入交互闭环。对平台团队来说，这会改变 incident triage、文档驱动开发和遗留系统理解的工作流。
items.why_it_matters_en: While less critical than governance controls, this expands the context boundary of coding agents: architecture diagrams, error screenshots, design docs, and PDF specs can now enter the same loop as code. For platform teams, this affects incident triage, doc-driven development, and legacy-system understanding workflows.
key_takeaways_zh: 多模态输入已覆盖 ask、plan、agent 等模式，说明其正从实验能力转向主线交互能力。
企业版默认开启且附件保留约 24 小时，团队需要重新评估文档与截图的敏感数据治理。
key_takeaways_en: Multimodal input now spans ask, plan, and agent modes, showing it is moving from experimental feature to core interaction primitive.
It is enabled by default for enterprise users with roughly 24-hour attachment retention, so teams should revisit governance for sensitive docs and screenshots.

top_items: Set AI credit session limits in Copilot CLI and SDK
Enterprises can default to auto model selection
themes_zh: AI coding 的企业治理正在配置化、集中化
代码代理的运行时控制开始覆盖成本与模型路由
仓库语义理解正通过插件与 language server 深度集成
多模态上下文成为主流开发工作流的一部分
themes_en: Enterprise governance for AI coding is becoming centralized and configuration-driven
Agent runtime controls are expanding to cost management and model routing
Repo-semantic understanding is deepening through plugins and language servers
Multimodal context is becoming part of mainstream developer workflows
implications_zh: 平台团队应尽快评估是否用 managed-settings.json 统一模型策略、插件白名单和权限边界。
对任何无人值守代理任务，应将会话级 credit 限额、作业预算和告警纳入默认模板。
原生代码库或复杂 monorepo 团队应关注 language server 驱动的代理上下文接入，而不是仅依赖向量检索。
多模态默认开启后，截图、架构图和 PDF 文档将进入代码助手上下文，需要同步更新数据分类与保留策略。
implications_en: Platform teams should evaluate managed-settings.json as the default mechanism for model policy, plugin allowlists, and permission boundaries.
Any unattended agent workflow should adopt session credit caps, job budgets, and alerting as standard templates.
Teams with native codebases or complex monorepos should pay attention to language-server-backed agent context, not just vector retrieval.
With multimodal support enabled by default, screenshots, diagrams, and PDFs now enter coding-assistant context and require updated data classification and retention policies.
reading_order: Enterprises can default to auto model selection
Set AI credit session limits in Copilot CLI and SDK
New C++ language server config skill for Copilot CLI
what_to_ignore_zh: GitHub Models 退役是产品路线调整，但对 AI coding 技术栈本身的新增信息有限。
Kimi K2.7 Code 上架 Copilot 有一定市场信号，但缺少评测、路由策略或工程集成细节，优先级低于治理与 runtime 控制类更新。
Secret scanning 相关更新对安全团队有价值，但与 AI coding agents、评测、MCP、仓库理解的主线关联较弱。
what_to_ignore_en: The GitHub Models retirement is a product-line change, but it adds limited new technical insight for AI coding workflows.
Kimi K2.7 Code arriving in Copilot has some market signal, but lacks evaluation, routing, or engineering-integration depth compared with governance and runtime-control updates.
The secret-scanning updates matter to security teams, but are less connected to today’s core thread around AI coding agents, evals, MCP, and repo understanding.
